quotes.verbatim_quote:
When you
have become comfortable using these rhythms exclusively without stopping try combining any
two of them to make a 6/4 rhythm.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Compositional rule for layering polyrhythmic cells.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Try combining four of them to create a line with 3/4 phrasing over 4/4 that is less obvious

Once you have gone through the exercises in this chapter try just playing random 3/4 over 4/4
using one 3/4 rhythm, then another and another without any program in mind. This really gets it
into your unconscious mind.

takes five bars of
4/4 to equal four bars of 5/4. To check yourself out when practicing these rhythms the pattern
should hit one on the sixth bar.

When playing a 7/4 rhythm it
takes seven bars to work out so that on the eighth bar you are starting on beat one again.
